no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-6904a90b — no changes required in this attempt.

(a) What is done
----------------
Every acceptance criterion (1–10) in the bead is already satisfied in the
tree at the checkpoint revision 51bb2f5d:

 1. `billingMode` field on session records.
    - `cli/internal/agent/types.go` — SessionEntry.BillingMode.
    - `cli/internal/agent/session_index.go` — SessionIndexEntry.BillingMode
      (enum-validated on write via AppendSessionIndex +
      ValidateBillingMode).
    - Test: TestAppendSessionIndexDerivesAndValidatesBillingMode in
      `cli/internal/agent/session_index_test.go` covers explicit paid,
      subscription, local, the rejected "free" value, and derivation on
      write.

 2. `billingModeFor(harness, surface, baseURL)` classifier.
    - `cli/internal/agent/billing_mode.go`.
    - Test: TestBillingModeForClassifiesHarnessesAndEndpoints in
      `cli/internal/agent/billing_mode_test.go` covers claude, codex,
      gemini-cli → subscription; openrouter / openai / anthropic → paid;
      agent → local; openai-compat with localhost / 127.0.0.1 /
      192.168.* / 10.* → local; openai-compat with a public host → paid.

 3. Reindex backfill.
    - `cli/internal/agent/session_index.go:ReindexLegacySessions`
      routes each legacy row through SessionIndexEntryFromLegacy, which
      calls billingModeFor when the row has no stored mode.
    - Test: TestReindexLegacySessionsBackfillsBillingMode in
      `cli/internal/agent/session_index_test.go` asserts the three
      modes land on a mixed fixture and fails if any row is written
      without one.

 4. `sessionsCostSummary` GraphQL rollup.
    - Schema: `cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql` lines
      707–717 (type) and 1977–1984 (query).
    - Resolver: `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_agent.go`
      delegates to ServerState.GetSessionsCostSummaryGraphQL in
      `cli/internal/server/state_graphql.go:676`, which reads
      month-shard-scoped session index entries and buckets by
      billingMode.
    - Tests: TestSessionsCostSummaryBucketsAndEmptyWindow and
      TestSessionsCostSummaryLocalEstimateUsesConfiguredRate in
      `cli/internal/server/session_cost_summary_test.go` cover the
      three buckets, the empty-window zeroing, and the configured
      local estimate path.

 5. UI — three cards (Cash paid / Subscription value / Local sessions).
    - `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/sessions/+page.svelte`
      lines 215–295.
    - Playwright: `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/sessions.spec.ts`
      lines 164–181 assert each card is present and the explanatory
      tooltip appears on hover.

 6. UI — per-row badge.
    - +page.svelte lines 376–392 render a `cash` / `sub` / `local`
      badge with colour classes and an aria-labelled tooltip.
    - Playwright: sessions.spec.ts lines 169, 170, 183–184, 197
      assert each badge class on a seeded fixture with one session
      of each billing mode.

 7. Zero-state.
    - +page.svelte:fmtCardCost returns `—` when no sessions of that
      bucket exist; fmtLocalValue returns `0` when local count is
      zero.
    - Playwright: sessions.spec.ts lines 241–243 assert `—`, `—`,
      and `0` for the three cards on an empty fixture.

 8. Optional local cost config.
    - Schema: `cli/internal/config/schema/config.schema.json` declares
      `cost.local_per_1k_tokens`.
    - Types: `cli/internal/config/types.go` surfaces Cost.LocalPer1KTokens.
    - Resolver: state_graphql.go:localCostPer1KTokens reads it and
      GetSessionsCostSummaryGraphQL multiplies sum(totalTokens) by
      the rate, dividing by 1000.
    - Tests: TestSessionsCostSummaryLocalEstimateUsesConfiguredRate
      covers the set and unset paths; Playwright spec at
      sessions.spec.ts line 286 asserts `$0.42 est.` is rendered.

 9. Accessibility.
    - +page.svelte aria-labels on each card (lines 223, 249, 276) and
      on each per-row badge (line 382) expose the bucket meaning
      independent of the tooltip.

10. Cross-references.
    - Dependency on ddx-2ceb02fa is satisfied — billingMode is part
      of the sharded index row.
    - `ddx-23978824`'s notes in `.ddx/beads.jsonl` line 78 contain
      "Cross-reference: ddx-6904a90b splits session costs into paid,
      subscription-equivalent, and local billingMode buckets; the
      unified endpoints usage/quota work should reuse those
      billingMode semantics…". `ddx bead show ddx-23978824 --json`
      shows the reference at the top of the notes field.

Test verification performed in this attempt:
    go test ./internal/agent  -count=1  → PASS
    go test ./internal/server -count=1  → PASS
    go test ./internal/server/graphql -count=1 → PASS

(b) What is blocking
--------------------
Nothing. The implementation shipped in commit 5c44d00d (feat(sessions):
split cost buckets by billing mode). The tracker cross-reference in
ddx-23978824 was added in the subsequent tracker-update commit 7d6cd60d
and is present at the current HEAD (51bb2f5d).

The previous REQUEST_CHANGES review noted that the implementation
commit's diff did not itself contain the `.ddx/beads.jsonl` tracker
update. That update is now in the tree and cannot be redone without
duplicating a no-op edit. There is no code or content change this
attempt could commit that would add value.

(c) What a follow-up attempt would need
---------------------------------------
A follow-up attempt has nothing to implement. If the reviewer still
needs evidence of the tracker update being associated with this bead,
the history to inspect is `git log --oneline 51bb2f5d -- .ddx/beads.jsonl`
— the cross-reference is reachable from HEAD via commit 7d6cd60d and
was authored in the course of closing this bead.
